content: {"file": "backend/api/routers/ingest.py", "summary": "This file contains FastAPI endpoints for ingesting PDFs and code repositories into a database. It handles asynchronous job registration, execution in the background, progress tracking, and status retrieval.", "rules": [{"name": "IngestPDFsEndpoint", "description": "Handles POST request to initiate ingestion of PDF files from a specified folder path.", "conditions": ["Request contains IngestPdfsRequest with folder_path"], "actions": ["Generate unique job ID", "Register job in the system", "Start background task for PDF ingestion", "Return job ID and status"]}, {"name": "IngestCodeEndpoint", "description": "Handles POST request to initiate ingestion of code repositories from a specified repository path.", "conditions": ["Request contains IngestCodeRequest with repo_path"], "actions": ["Generate unique job ID", "Register job in the system", "Start background task for code ingestion", "Return job ID and status"]}, {"name": "IngestStatusEndpoint", "description": "Handles GET request to retrieve the current status of an ingestion job.", "conditions": ["Job ID is provided"], "actions": ["Retrieve job details from storage", "Check if job exists", "Return job status, progress, errors, and result"]}], "dependencies": ["fastapi", "pydantic", "uuid", "ingestion.ingest_code", "ingestion.ingest_pdfs", "api.ingest_jobs"]}
